message:
fix(tests): add spawn_targeted impl to FailingMockWezterm in wezterm_labruntime

Add the missing spawn_targeted trait method to the FailingMockWezterm
test mock, completing the WeztermInterface implementation after the
trait extension in the spawn_targeted commit.
